command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git pull origin main

echo "=== EXPORT POST-CHANGE WORKFLOW ==="
curl -s -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0YjkyYzA5MS1kMTM3LTRiYmYtODIyMy03ODFhMjZjZGQwODEiLCJpc3MiOiJuOG4iLCJhdWQiOiJwdWJsaWMtYXBpIiwianRpIjoiMDAxZTM0OWYtNjYzMC00OTQyLTljOTQtZGEyZjk4YzlmOGYzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgwNzk5OTExfQ.SRoqA9YJaMud-bhWB1KqGOzat9f8hXDlqe9aHxIMerE" "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P" -o /tmp/router-phase8h.json
echo "Export: $(wc -c < /tmp/router-phase8h.json) bytes"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/router-phase8h.json')); print('Nodes:', [n['name'] for n in d.get('nodes',[])])"

echo "=== STORE PRODUCTION BASELINE ==="
cp /tmp/router-phase8h.json "baselines/production/router/chatgpt-homelab-agent-router-Phase8H-SentinelPrototype.json"
ls -lah baselines/production/router/

echo "=== UPDATE PHASE REGISTER ==="
python3 -c "
content = open('docs/phase-register.md').read()
content = content.replace(
  '### Phase 7B\n- **Git-backed Baseline Management**\n- Status: In Progress',
  '### Phase 7B\n- **Git-backed Baseline Management**\n- Status: Complete'
)
addition = '''
#### Phase 8H
- Runtime Sentinel Prototype - Complete
- Commit: Phase8H-SentinelPrototype
- Tag: Phase8H-SentinelPrototype
- Nodes added: Sentinel Consultation, Compliance Decision, Sentinel Response Merge
- All 4 validation tests: PASS
- Sentinel executes, reports, does not block
'''
content = content.replace('## Pending', addition + '\n## Pending')
open('docs/phase-register.md','w').write(content)
print('phase-register.md updated')
"

echo "=== COMMIT ==="
git add .
git status
git commit -m "Phase 8H Sentinel Prototype - runtime implementation complete"

echo "=== TAG ==="
git tag Phase8H-SentinelPrototype

echo "=== PUSH ==="
git push origin main
git push origin Phase8H-SentinelPrototype
git push github main
git push github Phase8H-SentinelPrototype

echo "=== FINAL VERIFY ==="
git log --oneline -5
git tag -l | tail -5
